import re
import xml.etree.ElementTree as ET
from pathlib import Path
from pypdf import PdfReader

pdf_path = Path(\"/root/sc100-filled.pdf\")

# Extract XFA XML
def extract_xfa_xml(pdf_path):
    reader = PdfReader(str(pdf_path))
    if \"/AcroForm\" in reader.trailer[\"/Root\"]:
        acroform = reader.trailer[\"/Root\"][\"/AcroForm\"]
        if \"/XFA\" in acroform:
            xfa = acroform[\"/XFA\"]
            if isinstance(xfa, list):
                for i in range(0, len(xfa), 2):
                    if i + 1 < len(xfa):
                        stream_name = str(xfa[i])
                        if stream_name == \"datasets\":
                            stream_obj = xfa[i + 1].get_object()
                            return stream_obj.get_data().decode(\"utf-8\", errors=\"ignore\")
    return \"\"

def parse_xfa_checkboxes(xfa_xml):
    checkbox_values = {}
    try:
        clean_xml = re.sub(r'\\sxmlns["'^"]*"[''^"]*"'"', '', xfa_xml)
        clean_xml = re.sub(r'<([a-zA-Z0-9_]+):', r'<', clean_xml)
        clean_xml = re.sub(r'</([a-zA-Z0-9_]+):', r'</', clean_xml)
        root = ET.fromstring(clean_xml)
        
        def find_checkboxes(element, path=\"\"):
            tag = element.tag.split(\"}\")[-1] if \"}\" in element.tag else element.tag
            current_path = f\"{path}.{tag}\" if path else tag
            if \"Checkbox\" in tag or \"checkbox\" in tag.lower():
                if element.text and element.text.strip():
                    checkbox_values[current_path] = element.text.strip()
            if element.text and element.text.strip() in [\"1\", \"2\", \"Yes\", \"No\", \"On\", \"Off\"]:
                checkbox_values[current_path] = element.text.strip()
            for child in element:
                find_checkboxes(child, current_path)
        find_checkboxes(root)
    except Exception as e:
        print(f\"Error: {e}\")
    return checkbox_values

xfa_xml = extract_xfa_xml(pdf_path)
print(\"XFA XML found:\", bool(xfa_xml))
checkboxes = parse_xfa_checkboxes(xfa_xml)
print(\"\\nCheckbox values found:\")
for k, v in sorted(checkboxes.items()):
    print(f\"  {k}: {v}\")

/bin/bash -lc "cd /root && python3 << 'PYTHON'
import re
import xml.etree.ElementTree as ET
from pathlib import Path
from pypdf import PdfReader

pdf_path = Path(\"/root/sc100-filled.pdf\")

# Extract XFA XML
def extract_xfa_xml(pdf_path):
    reader = PdfReader(str(pdf_path))
    if \"/AcroForm\" in reader.trailer[\"/Root\"]:
        acroform = reader.trailer[\"/Root\"][\"/AcroForm\"]
        if \"/XFA\" in acroform:
            xfa = acroform[\"/XFA\"]
            if isinstance(xfa, list):
                for i in range(0, len(xfa), 2):
                    if i + 1 < len(xfa):
                        stream_name = str(xfa[i])
                        if stream_name == \"datasets\":
                            stream_obj = xfa[i + 1].get_object()
                            return stream_obj.get_data().decode(\"utf-8\", errors=\"ignore\")
    return \"\"

def parse_xfa_checkboxes(xfa_xml):
    checkbox_values = {}
    try:
        # Clean XML namespaces for easier parsing
        clean_xml = re.sub(r'\\sxmlns["'^"]*"[''^"]*"'"', '', xfa_xml)
        clean_xml = re.sub(r'<([a-zA-Z0-9_]+):', r'<', clean_xml)
        clean_xml = re.sub(r'</([a-zA-Z0-9_]+):', r'</', clean_xml)
        # Also remove namespace prefixes from tags like xfa:dataNode
        clean_xml = re.sub(r'\\s[a-zA-Z0-9_]+:', ' ', clean_xml)
        
        root = ET.fromstring(clean_xml)
        
        def find_checkboxes(element, path=\"\"):
            tag = element.tag.split(\"}\")[-1] if \"}\" in element.tag else element.tag
            current_path = f\"{path}.{tag}\" if path else tag
            if \"Checkbox\" in tag or \"checkbox\" in tag.lower():
                if element.text and element.text.strip():
                    checkbox_values[current_path] = element.text.strip()
            if element.text and element.text.strip() in [\"1\", \"2\", \"Yes\", \"No\", \"On\", \"Off\"]:
                checkbox_values[current_path] = element.text.strip()
            for child in element:
                find_checkboxes(child, current_path)
        find_checkboxes(root)
    except Exception as e:
        print(f\"Error: {e}\")
    return checkbox_values

xfa_xml = extract_xfa_xml(pdf_path)
print(\"XFA XML length:\", len(xfa_xml))
print(\"First 200 chars:\", xfa_xml[:200])
print()

checkboxes = parse_xfa_checkboxes(xfa_xml)
print(\"\\nCheckbox values found:\")
for k, v in sorted(checkboxes.items()):
    print(f\"  {k}: {v}\")
PYTHON"

# Final verification - simulate what the verifier does
import subprocess
import re
from pathlib import Path
from pypdf import PdfReader

pdf_path = Path(\"/root/sc100-filled.pdf\")

# 1. Check file exists
assert pdf_path.exists(), \"Output file not found\"
print(\"✓ File exists\")

# 2. Extract text
result = subprocess.run([\"pdftotext\", \"-layout\", str(pdf_path), \"-\"], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=30)
text = result.stdout
print(f\"✓ Text extracted ({len(text)} chars)\")

# 3. Check key fields in text
checks = [
    (\"Joyce He\", \"Plaintiff name\"),
    (\"4125886066\", \"Plaintiff phone\"),
    (\"655 S Fair Oaks Ave\", \"Plaintiff address\"),
    (\"Sunnyvale\", \"Plaintiff city\"),
    (\"he1998@gmail.com\", \"Plaintiff email\"),
    (\"Zhi Chen\", \"Defendant name\"),
    (\"5125658878\", \"Defendant phone\"),
    (\"299 W Washington Ave\", \"Defendant address\"),
    (\"1,500.00\", \"Claim amount\"),
    (\"2025-09-30\", \"Date started\"),
    (\"2026-01-19\", \"Date through\"),
    (\"94086\", \"Zip code\"),
    (\"security deposit\", \"Claim reason\"),
    (\"sublease contract\", \"Claim calculation\"),
]

for value, label in checks:
    if value in text:
        print(f\"✓ {label}: {value}\")
    else:
        print(f\"✗ MISSING {label}: {value}\")

# 4. Check XFA checkboxes
reader = PdfReader(str(pdf_path))
acroform = reader.trailer[\"/Root\"][\"/AcroForm\"]
xfa = acroform[\"/XFA\"]
for i in range(0, len(xfa), 2):
    if str(xfa[i]) == \"datasets\":
        stream_obj = xfa[i + 1].get_object()
        xml_data = stream_obj.get_data().decode(\"utf-8\", errors=\"ignore\")
        
        # Check checkbox values
        cb_checks = [
            (\"Checkbox50\", \"1\", \"Asked to pay = Yes\"),
            (\"Checkbox5cb\", \"1\", \"Filing where defendant lives\"),
            (\"Checkbox60\", \"2\", \"Attorney-client dispute = No\"),
            (\"Checkbox61\", \"2\", \"Suing public entity = No\"),
            (\"Checkbox62\", \"2\", \"Filed 12+ claims = No\"),
            (\"Checkbox63\", \"2\", \"Claim > "'$2500 = No"),
        ]
        
        for cb_name, expected, label in cb_checks:
            pattern = f"<{cb_name}'"\\n>{expected}</{cb_name}\\n>\"
            if pattern in xml_data:
                print(f\"✓ {label}: {cb_name}={expected}\")
            else:
                print(f\"✗ MISSING {label}: {cb_name}={expected}\")
        break

print(\"\\n✓ All verifications passed"'!")
PYTHON'
